special_mechanics.name: Rock Throwing
special_mechanics.description: Chuck can pick up and throw rocks and boulders at enemies and obstacles

special_mechanics.name: Belly Thrust Attack
special_mechanics.description: Chuck attacks enemies by thrusting his beer belly

special_mechanics.name: Kicking
special_mechanics.description: Chuck can kick while above ground

special_mechanics.name: Boulder Platforming
special_mechanics.description: Boulders can be used as platforms to reach areas and obtain bonus items

special_mechanics.name: Rock Shield
special_mechanics.description: Rocks can shield Chuck from hazards falling from above

special_mechanics.name: Mount Creatures
special_mechanics.description: Chuck can ride certain creatures like a brontosaurus to traverse levels

special_mechanics.name: Seesaw Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Some creatures like crocodiles function as seesaws to bounce over obstacles

tier_notes: Tier 3: Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides game mechanics and level design information but contains no quantitative physics parameters, sub-pixel data, or precise movement values. Game mechanics are described qualitatively (e.g., 'kicking while above ground', 'thrusting belly'). No technical documentation of jump height, gravity, acceleration, or sub-pixel systems is available.
